  • Package com.hazelcast.config

    • Class com.hazelcast.config.AbstractCacheConfig extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cacheLoaderFactory

          com.hazelcast.cache.impl.DeferredValue<V> cacheLoaderFactory
          The Factory for the CacheLoader.

        • cacheWriterFactory

          com.hazelcast.cache.impl.DeferredValue<V> cacheWriterFactory
          The Factory for the CacheWriter.

        • expiryPolicyFactory

          com.hazelcast.cache.impl.DeferredValue<V> expiryPolicyFactory
          The Factory for the ExpiryPolicy.

        • isReadThrough

          boolean isReadThrough
          A flag indicating if "read-through" mode is required.

        • isWriteThrough

          boolean isWriteThrough
          A flag indicating if "write-through" mode is required.

        • isStatisticsEnabled

          boolean isStatisticsEnabled
          A flag indicating if statistics gathering is enabled.

        • isStoreByValue

          boolean isStoreByValue
          A flag indicating if the cache will be store-by-value or store-by-reference.

        • isManagementEnabled

          boolean isManagementEnabled
          Whether management is enabled

        • hotRestartConfig

          HotRestartConfig hotRestartConfig

        • eventJournalConfig

          EventJournalConfig eventJournalConfig

        • listenerConfigurations

          Set<E> listenerConfigurations
          The CacheEntryListenerConfigurations for the Configuration.

        • keyType

          Class<T> keyType
          The type of keys for Caches configured with this Configuration.

        • keyClassName

          String keyClassName

        • valueType

          Class<T> valueType
          The type of values for Caches configured with this Configuration.

        • valueClassName

          String valueClassName

    • Class com.hazelcast.config.CacheConfig extends AbstractCacheConfig<K,V> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • name

          String name

        • managerPrefix

          String managerPrefix

        • uriString

          String uriString

        • asyncBackupCount

          int asyncBackupCount

        • backupCount

          int backupCount

        • splitBrainProtectionName

          String splitBrainProtectionName

        • wanReplicationRef

          WanReplicationRef wanReplicationRef

        • inMemoryFormat

          InMemoryFormat inMemoryFormat

        • evictionConfig

          EvictionConfig evictionConfig

        • mergePolicyConfig

          MergePolicyConfig mergePolicyConfig

        • partitionLostListenerConfigs

          List<E> partitionLostListenerConfigs

        • disablePerEntryInvalidationEvents

          boolean disablePerEntryInvalidationEvents
          Disables invalidation events for per entry but full-flush invalidation events are still enabled. Full-flush invalidation means the invalidation of events for all entries when clear is called.

        • tenantControl

          TenantControl tenantControl

    • Class com.hazelcast.config.CachePartitionLostListenerConfig extends ListenerConfig implements Serializable

          Used by the NearCacheConfigAccessor to initialize the proper default value for on-heap maps.
